# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

apiVersion: kong.konghq.com/v1
kind: KongService
metadata:
  name: service-name
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: service-url
  port: 80
  protocol: http
  plugins:
    - name: kong.request.tls
      config:
        verify_host: true
        cafile: /etc/kong/certs/ca.crt
        certfile: /etc/kong/certs/service-cert.pem
        keyfile: /etc/kong/certs/service-key.pem
    - name: kong.access.oauth2
      config:
        client_id: client-id
        client_secret: client-secret
        url: oauth-url
        grant_type: authorization_code
        scope: openid profile email

---
apiVersion: kong.konghq.com/v1
kind: KongRoute
metadata:
  name: route-name
  namespace: default
spec:
  service: service-name
  host: api.example.com
  paths:
    - /microservice/*
  strip_path: true
  plugins:
    - name: kong.access.oauth2
      config:
        always_authenticate: true
        authenticate_upstream: false
        request_header: Authorization
        response_set_header: Set-Cookie
    - name: kong.response.transform
      config:
        strip_prefix: /microservice/
    - name: kong.request.rewrite_host
      config:
        rewrite_host: api.example.com
    - name: kong.response.set-header
      config:
        header: X-Custom-Header
        value: Custom Value

---
apiVersion: kong.konghq.com/v1
kind: KongPlugin
metadata:
  name: oauth2-plugin
spec:
  id: kong.access.oauth2
